title: 突發 藍韜文屌柒匯豐

replies.msg:
https://www.telegraph.co.uk/business/2020/07/01/raab-hits-hsbc-asfirst-arrests-made-hong-kong-security-law/

Foreign secretary Dominic Raab has launched a fresh broadside against HSBC over its support for a brutal crackdown in Hong Kong, after the first arrests were made under Beijing's controversial new security law.

Mr Raab attacked the lender for throwing its weight behind the new rule, which criminalises anti-government movements in the former British colony and introduces life sentences or long term jail terms for vaguely defined national security crimes.
